psychologicalTheme: Subterranean hive mind — simple personality, extreme collectivism. Dismissive-avoidant — intelligence outside the network is confusing, not threatening. Type 9w8 (Peacemaker with Challenger wing): passive until provoked, then surprisingly forceful. Only 3 subfacets because hive minds lack individual emotional complexity. Highest loyalty/authority moral foundations — the hive IS the self. Low psychopathy is functional (hive members are tools, not objects of empathy). When stressed, becomes paranoid and anxious (Type 6 direction).
